As has been the case for over 200 years, the Electoral College determines the outcome of U.S. presidential races. Yet most Americans have long supported moving away from this system. **More than six-in-ten Americans (63%) would instead prefer to see the winner of the presidential election be the person who wins the most votes nationally.** Roughly a third (35%) favor retaining the Electoral College system, according to a Pew Research Center survey of 9,720 adults conducted last fall. We're clearly all tired of a system where all our candidates and their campaigns care about is whether the margin of victory is close enough in the state to make it worthwhile to campaign there instead of speaking to real Americans with real challenges. **[The people who tell you we can't get rid of the Electoral College are wrong. Chip in $25 or more to help us change to a popular vote system once and for all>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111382493/557047027/-523723236?amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA0MWRiNWE1LTdjNWYtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=p8p6YxS5_ZN-fj-hU_gUgRGNsmK4XuuZsq5axOqxSRQ=&emci=2b40460f-7b5f-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=041db5a5-7c5f-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=33603084)**

| | Defenders of voting rights like Cory Booker, AOC, Robert Reich, and Stacey Abrams recognize that the Electoral College is harming our democracy and needs to go. **It’s the biggest tool the opponents of voting rights have to swing national elections and suppress the will of the people.** We have to move to a system that's right and just over a system that benefits only themselves and silences others. **This is about the people's voices being heard and their votes meaning something**. This is about a system that has rewarded the popular vote loser with the job anyway five times now. This about the people and the states that get ignored and lost along the way to _*just enough*_ Electoral College votes. **[The Electoral College is an antiquated system built for a vastly different America and we need to adapt to our changing needs as a democracy. Fuel our efforts with $25 or whatever you can today to help end it>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111382500/557047034/-523723236?amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA0MWRiNWE1LTdjNWYtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=p8p6YxS5_ZN-fj-hU_gUgRGNsmK4XuuZsq5axOqxSRQ=&emci=2b40460f-7b5f-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=041db5a5-7c5f-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=33603084)**Thank you,

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.

Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. [**Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111382506/557047040/-1704790427?amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA0MWRiNWE1LTdjNWYtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=p8p6YxS5_ZN-fj-hU_gUgRGNsmK4XuuZsq5axOqxSRQ=&emci=2b40460f-7b5f-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=041db5a5-7c5f-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=33603084)

clean_body: PRC: Majority of Americans continue to favor moving away from Electoral College| | | Team: When nearly two out of every three Americans agree on something, it's probably a good idea to do it. When it comes to the Electoral College -- a system that isn't equipped to handle the stress tests that opponents of voting rights are giving it -- we need to end it and stop letting cynical candidates game the system to take power. | | | As has been the case for over 200 years, the Electoral College determines the outcome of U.S. presidential races. Yet most Americans have long supported moving away from this system. More than six-in-ten Americans (63%) would instead prefer to see the winner of the presidential election be the person who wins the most votes nationally. Roughly a third (35%) favor retaining the Electoral College system, according to a Pew Research Center survey of 9,720 adults conducted last fall. We're clearly all tired of a system where all our candidates and their campaigns care about is whether the margin of victory is close enough in the state to make it worthwhile to campaign there instead of speaking to real Americans with real challenges. If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Defenders of voting rights like Cory Booker, AOC, Robert Reich, and Stacey Abrams recognize that the Electoral College is harming our democracy and needs to go. It’s the biggest tool the opponents of voting rights have to swing national elections and suppress the will of the people. We have to move to a system that's right and just over a system that benefits only themselves and silences others. This is about the people's voices being heard and their votes meaning something. This is about a system that has rewarded the popular vote loser with the job anyway five times now. This about the people and the states that get ignored and lost along the way to just enough Electoral College votes. you, Voter Action Project's Electoral College Team | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Box 19294 Portland, OR 97280 United States

name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: NC is open — help us flip it now
body:
🚨 BREAKING: Sen. Thom Tillis (R-NC) just announced he won’t run for reelection — handing us a rare chance to flip a must-win seat in battleground North Carolina.
We need to raise $15,000 IMMEDIATELY so we can help seize this chance, turn this seat BLUE, and TAKE BACK the Senate >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-takebacknc?refcode=070225_3]
Trump’s MAGA machine will dump millions to keep this seat red. Billionaire donors are already writing blank checks to stop us from taking control.
If we want to break the GOP’s stranglehold on our democracy, it starts RIGHT HERE. RIGHT NOW.
North Carolina is one of the tightest swing states in the country — we can’t afford to fall behind.
Rush ANY amount you can to help flip NC blue, flip the Senate, and end Republican control once and for all. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-takebacknc?refcode=070225_3]
Every single dollar will help fund the fight to recruit strong Democrats, fund on-the-ground organizing, and take on the MAGA lies flooding our airwaves.
Republicans are counting on us to be distracted, divided, or too exhausted to try and take back this OPEN Senate seat. We KNOW you aren't going to prove them right! Chip in now so we can help turn North Carolina blue >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-takebacknc?refcode=070225_3] . name: Case Dixon
subject: In Case You Missed It: Our First Campaign Video Is Live!
body:
Patriots,
In case you missed it — we launched our very first campaign video last week!

It’s already been picked up by several publications, including:
🔹 [ 1819 News](https://1819news.com/news/item/we-need-something-different-case-dixon-announces-challenge-to-gary-palmer-for-congressional-district-6 "https://1819news.com/news/item/we-need-something-different-case-dixon-announces-challenge-to-gary-palmer-for-congressional-district-6")
🔹 [ Yellowhammer News](https://yellowhammernews.com/25-year-old-gary-palmer-challenger-case-dixon-releases-video-ad-in-campaign-for-u-s-congress/ "https://yellowhammernews.com/25-year-old-gary-palmer-challenger-case-dixon-releases-video-ad-in-campaign-for-u-s-congress/")
🔹 [ Alabama Daily News](https://aldailynews.com/case-dixon-launches-campaign-video-to-challenge-gary-palmer/ "https://aldailynews.com/case-dixon-launches-campaign-video-to-challenge-gary-palmer/")
🔹[ Alabama Political Reporter](https://www.alreporter.com/2025/07/09/case-dixon-launches-campaign-for-u-s-congress/ "https://www.alreporter.com/2025/07/09/case-dixon-launches-campaign-for-u-s-congress/")
🔹 [ AL Politics](https://alpolitics.com/case-dixon-releases-first-campaign-video-in-al-6-congressional-race/ "https://alpolitics.com/case-dixon-releases-first-campaign-video-in-al-6-congressional-race/")

If you haven’t had a chance to watch it yet, you can check it out here:
👉 [ Watch the Video Now](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Pl9eU_z16KI "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Pl9eU_z16KI")

The campaign is going strong. I’ve been traveling across the district, speaking to conservative groups, meeting with voters, and sharing our message of fiscal sanity, restoring accountability, constitutional integrity, and citizen-led leadership.

Thank you all for every single donation. I can’t do this alone this alone. We’re powered by everyday conservatives like you. For those that haven’t donated, if you believe Alabama deserves better than career politicians, I hope you’ll chip in today:
👉 [ Donate here](https://secure.winred.com/dixon-for-us-congress/donate-today-2d26b569160a252d "https://secure.winred.com/dixon-for-us-congress/donate-today-2d26b569160a252d")

One more thing: Please forward this email to 5 friends who care about the future of our country. That simple act goes a long way in helping us grow this movement.
Thank you for standing with me and God bless.

**Case Dixon **
Dixon for Congress
(205) 282-9103
615 Brooklane Dr. #3218
Hueytown, AL 35023-2508
DIXONFORUSCONGRESS.COM

This is our worst ranking since 2018. Why? Because Trump’s federal job cuts are having a real impact on our economy. = These federal job cuts are a direct hit to Virginia’s economy, reputation, and competitiveness. But Gov. Glenn Youngkin, Lt. Gov. Winsome Earle-Sears, and Atty. Gen. Jason Miyares refuse to protect Virginia’s jobs against Trump’s reckless agenda. That’s why we’ve slipped from #1 to #4 in just one year. That’s not leadership. It’s negligence. This November, we have the power to choose leadership that will fight for our Commonwealth. Abigail Spanberger, Ghazala Hashmi, and Jay Jones are fighting to build a more resilient economy, defend working families, attract new investments, and restore competence and compassion to Richmond. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = Our choice is between MAGA extremism that tears down, or Democratic leadership that builds Virginia up. name: Cynthia Lummis
subject: The majority is on the line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zb596vvrc7mjmj28cqleubg7o7aqbn2jvrq9i5so_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g60o72cph2bs)

Dear Friend,
I've spent my life fighting for Wyoming -- because this is my home. I was born and raised on a cattle ranch in Laramie County, and my roots here run deep.

I know what it means to work hard, live free, and take pride in where you come from. That's the Wyoming way -- and it's exactly what I've taken with me to Washington.

From my years in the State Legislature to serving as your U.S. Senator, I've never stopped fighting to protect the values that make Wyoming strong and America great.

Whether it's securing our borders, defending the Second Amendment, or creating good-paying jobs, **[I've always put Wyoming and America first.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zo89jj4ehfrt0g5pgl726os0lqkskpca7gi0b08g_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g60o72cph2bs)**

As Chair of the Senate Western Caucus and a member of the conservative Senate Steering Committee, I pushed back against the Biden administration's extreme agenda -- especially when it came to reckless spending, anti-energy mandates, and efforts to lock up our lands.

I've fought to protect our coal, oil, gas, and uranium industries, because I know how vital they are -- not just to Wyoming's economy, but to America's future.

This year, I've also been fighting to cut red tape, secure our border, and lead on crypto policy that protects innovation and freedom. _**[I'm in the Senate to make Washington work for Wyoming -- not the other way around.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zu6j8ib6t8o0qmrh2did9htej7s7drsrlk470a58_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g60o72cph2bs)**_

_But now, our work is under serious threat._

**[Democrats have made it clear: flipping the Senate is their top priority in 2026.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2za7palomqhjou08dp1201s9407c8f55vsqlfc8r8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g60o72cph2bs)** They know that without the Senate, they can't ram through their radical agenda.

That's why they're pouring money into races across the country -- including right here in the West -- trying to tip the balance of power in their favor.

_**[We can't let that happen.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z8r0vge006gd8to7u19pvhe1cnn43pn0m6jfmdsg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g60o72cph2bs)**_

If we lose our Senate majority, we lose the ability to block dangerous policies and stand up for the freedoms we hold dear. **[That's why I'm asking for your help today.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z97j7o7mt2utk27heqcm175i9d3f737uldc68928_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g60o72cph2bs)**

**[Will you chip in to help us hold the line and defend our Senate majority?](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zbd709agrherkse12akqd98fj6ulrt8gvnsod8vg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g60o72cph2bs) [Every dollar you give will go directly toward fighting back against the Left's assault on our values and helping me continue to be a voice for America First priorities in Washington.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zdnn3oj91d7fu6p82a2mmv84mhp4pva9bdh8mp9o_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g60o72cph2bs)**

[Chip in $10](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zbhninae3ca34qkrdepjmqvc94dl8jvgneppih3o_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g60o72cph2bs)

[Chip in $25](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2za7a4o20e3g310ufp9v3h93qig6751a07tvvdo8g_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g60o72cph2bs)

[Chip in any amount](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zqrvhtva4e4cgq57g2jtnh7f5j3q9e5sqd71pdho_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g60o72cph2bs)

I'm not in this fight for headlines or personal gain. I'm in it because I love Wyoming and America -- and because I believe that with the right leadership, our best days are still ahead.

Thank you for standing with me.

With gratitude,

Cynthia Lummis
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z4tk9a1tlj0t953n4a9l52f73nqdred88gvj9cp0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g60o72cph2bs)
United States Senator - Wyoming
[Chip in any amount](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zm4o8jsp43blr39acupeon8fadm9in6q2lra8t58_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g60o72cph2bs)

** **

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: The year was 1988 & I realized I was a Republican.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
When did you become a Republican?

| |
---
| | | | | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zf7lt5o97d3ndod7chgb0cv55h7judl33mmtbum0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g60o72c3h2bs)
---
Friend, I will admit something that might surprise you: I was a Democrat until 1988.

I grew up in the Bronx after my father came to America from Jamaica. As a teenager, I joined the Marine Corps and became a registered Democrat.

It wasn't until the 1988 Presidential Election - when I heard the candidates talking about abortion and welfare - that I realized my views were actually Republican.

We've all heard the notion from Democrats that they are the only political party that cares about folks who look like me. I believed it myself for so many years!

Once I started paying attention, I realized that the Republicans were discussing the issues that matter to me and my family. Their message of lifting folks out of poverty and giving them a chance to succeed instead of more government handouts resonated with me.

My entire adult life has been driven by personal responsibility and taking advantage of the opportunities provided to everyone in this country.

I never set out to be a politician--I spent most of my life raising my family and running a small business--but when I saw what was happening in my local community, I felt compelled to run for office.

Most people didn't give me a shot to win. I took on a 20-year incumbent in a deeply democratic district. Thankfully, I didn't listen to the chattering political class and instead took my conservative message directly to the voters--and it worked.
---
[ **GIVE WINSOME A SHOT TO WIN >>**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z112ukh7a5dggrn1u369gf3jlepjlufqr9qvpg60_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g60o72c3h2bs)
---
Those conversations and connections I made during that campaign showed me that while the Democrats like to talk about the issue of race and love to demonize the Republican party, it was the policies of conservatism that resonated most in those communities.

Republicans shouldn't shy away from tough conversations about the issues that matter to folks in the communities where I grew up.

We are the party that lifts everyone from poverty and allows every person to fulfill their God-given potential. As the Lieutenant Governor of Virginia, I am not shying away from discussing those issues across the Commonwealth.

I know that may ruffle some feathers in the political establishment, but once I heard the Republican party's policies, I quickly realized that they aligned with my values.

Please join me in my campaign for Governor and help ensure we spread our message to every community nationwide. Republicans should be proud of our record and values - and it's up to all of us to ensure we leave no voter behind.

_**[_**I would be grateful if you could contribute $25, $50, or even $100 to help fund our efforts over the next few months.**_](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zolahto5t39p6erbh6vqooq66pao5qo6f21sn608_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g60o72c3h2bs)**_
---
[ **CHIP IN $25 >>**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zohus709a7jbv305kn7jgn93ia7qer6l6l8850tg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g60o72c3h2bs)
---
[ **CHIP IN $50 >>**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2znvo43kbcn127sat6vp3lh8sb6pvml52nc5ffl3g_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g60o72c3h2bs)
---
[ **CHIP IN $100 >>**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2parpr2o3kr9boo73837j4274btg88dqui5chug_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g60o72c3h2bs)
---
[ **CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT >>**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z79fnstrgbq39b7m175eiiieflai4uehlhh5bhp0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g60o72c3h2bs)
---
We are on the brink of something incredible, but it will take each of us to do our part.
---

name: NRSC HQ
subject: Democrats are trying to pull a fast one
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
don’t let them catch us off guard

Friend, Democrats are trying to pull a fast one in Nebraska.

Dan Osborn, a fake "Independent" just announced he's running for Senate against NRSC Vice Chair Pete Ricketts.

This guy calls himself an independent, but he's fully backed by Chuck Schumer and the Democrat machine. If he's in the Senate, he'll do everything he can to cripple President Trump's agenda.

**[Will you help Pete fight back and win ASAP?](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z5dau92c3gvqie674coa078jdcga7bvrt69bm690_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g60o73cth2bs)**
[DONATE NOW >>](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zcj588phjncgqo4ce1qk4knmfipcip77ajojfee0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g60o73cth2bs)
**[Democrats tried to run this playbook last year, and they got really close.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zo19tv0q4blb6de6r0n4kkuvuefpq45r1cegpkdo_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g60o73cth2bs)** _It was the closest Senate race in Nebraska in more than 50 years._

They almost caught us asleep at the wheel then. They're hoping they'll catch us napping now.

**[We can't let it happen. >>](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zefaoqkbgql2pqtek217u6g6t6q1f579cnjhbkdo_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g60o73cth2bs)**

If you care about keeping President Trump's majority, this is your chance to slam the door on a Democrat scheme to end it.

Thanks in advance,

-NRSC HQ

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Pop Acta Media | Real American Reporting PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Larry Klayman, Freedom Watch Founder
subject: Leftists have unleashed their endgame: FEDERAL JUDICIAL COUP.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Freedom Watch USA, Inc
body:
Will you DEFEND Pres. Trump’s agenda?

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvgh46gfis2n5bdug6mh0uee2cfsi52g7tjv50m8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g60o72cph2bs)
---
Dear Patriot, ** ** ************ Across the country, Radical Leftists have taken to the streets to declare that America has no king. These violent protesters have the **audacity** to claim that President Donald Trump is a tyrant!
We know that the lawfully-elected President is not a king, but there is a group of despots who Americans should be worried about.
The real kings running America into the ground are the **CORRUPT LEFTIST AND RINO FEDERAL JUDGES** who twist and distort the Constitution to stop the will of the people and strip us of our sacred rights.
It's time we call it for what it is: **A FEDERAL JUDICIAL COUP**
The America-First agenda won in 2024, but every attempt by this administration to save our country is being thwarted by corrupt leftist federal judges. They are desperate to strip the executive of his constitutional powers!

No-Name Leftist Federal Judges are popping up out of nowhere with an evil agenda:
**🚨End deportations** ******🚨Resume funding to the Deep State** ******🚨Stop election security measures**
But when you've dedicated your life to suing Democrat traitors like Hillary Clinton, Barack Obama, George Soros - and even the leaders of the **Black Lives Matter** movement - you stop being afraid of the Marxists and learn to **FIGHT WITH PASSION**.
Allow me to introduce myself:
My name is **Larry Klayman**. I'm a lawyer who is proud to be the biggest pain the Clintons and Bidens have ever faced.
My nonprofit, **Freedom Watch USA** , exposes and prosecutes domestic and foreign corruption. These are just some of the traitors we are up against:
**Judge William Orrick** \- an Obama-worshipping Californian who issued a satanic injunction to protect sanctuary cities that harbor illegal alien murderers and rapists.
**Judges Paula Xinis & Stephanie Gallagher** - two open-border radicals who ordered illegal gang member Kilmar Abrego Garcia be brought back to America after being lawfully deported by the Trump administration,
**Judge Hannah Dugan** - a Milwaukee leftist who escorted an illegal alien out of her court room so that he could escape ICE arrest and deportation.

**It begs the question:** **Who are these federal judges working for?**

These crazed leftist and RINO federal judges **must** be impeached and prosecuted for repeatedly violating their oaths of office.
That's why we need **YOUR HELP!**
Freedom Watch is leading the peaceful and legal fight to prosecute them, just like we did with the Clintons, the Bidens, and Anthony Fauci.
We just cannot do it without the support of patriots like **YOU.**
With **YOUR** financial support behind us, Freedom Watch will embark on a **RELENTLESS CRUSADE** to expose these judicial traitors, their corrupt ties, and their **BRAZEN** political activism in the federal courts.
Will you rush back your **END THE FEDERAL JUDICIAL COUP** urgent reply with $35 or more to lead this fight with us?
Right now, we are fighting an uphill battle against the **DARKEST** , most powerful stronghold of the Deep State.
In fact, only EIGHT judges have been impeached in 247 YEARS!
The last to be impeached was Alcee Hastings for bribery, but the **SHAMELESS** Democrats made him a member of Congress instead!
It's clear that the Leftist plan to take over America was hatched in the dark corners of the judiciary.
Now, it's all coming to light as they fight tooth and nail to stop the America-First agenda.
There are hundreds of crooked leftist federal judges waiting in the wings for their turn to stop the will of the American people and destroy our constitutional republic.
That's why it's **CRUCIAL** that you don't leave this message unanswered.
My team and I are up against a **BILLIONAIRE-BACKED LEFTIST HORDE** , and our resources are being stretched to their breaking point. But your $35 donation in the next 48 hours can change that.
---

---
The quicker **YOU** respond, the quicker Freedom Watch can **END THE FEDERAL JUDICIAL COUP** being run on President Trump and the American people.

**DON 'T HESITATE**. The crooked leftist and RINO federal judges are counting on patriots like you to ignore the **FEDERAL JUDICIAL COUP** that's destroying America.
Thank you for your time and support.
For Our Sacred Republic,
---

name: Maud Marin
subject: A wave of crime and violence
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAUD FOR MANHATTAN
body:
He weaponized his office and infamously fabricated a “novel legal theory” to charge President Trump with 34 felonies.

| | |
---
---
| | My Dear Friend,**[Will you help me defeat Alvin Bragg?](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z2cpe35o40h9bvsajq99p1i4rpeorr9o7pdu4cf0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g60o76chh2bs)** He is the poster child of a Soros-backed district attorney. He weaponized his office and infamously fabricated a “ _novel legal theory_ ” to charge President Trump with 34 felonies. He brought New York City to its knees with soft-on-crime policies like “cashless bail.” And he prosecuted Daniel Penny the veteran and hero who risked his life to protect a subway car full of innocent New Yorkers from a menacing vagrant with a violent criminal past. **Make no mistake, Bragg and his fellow leftists would export this vision to your hometown in a ‘**** _New York minute_****’ if given the chance.** I’ll stop right there. If you find yourself thinking: _Say no more, Maud! I agree Alvin Bragg is not only a threat to New York City but to all Americans, and must be defeated..._ **[Then, by all means, skip the rest of this letter and go right to your DEFEAT ALVIN BRAGG Emergency reply form and send it in to me today.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zj0k8e461lck3hag1irb5o3nnjkac4sj498mnt28_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g60o76chh2bs)** But if you’d like to hear the litany of reasons to defeat Alvin Bragg or hear some more about my own background and why I am such a clear contrast and a clear threat to Bragg, then read on. It’ll come as no surprise to you that I’m asking for your financial support today to overcome Alvin Bragg and his Soros network of billionaire backers. He has been richly rewarded for prosecuting President Trump. His without a doubt the “darling” of the radical Left and a “folk hero” amongst the establishment media who are all too happy to wipe Bragg’s fingerprints off every story related to crime and squalor in New York City. You want to know the worst part about the decay happening here on Alvin Bragg’s watch? It is all by design. His actions are intentionally driving this violent crime streak:
---
* **“Manhattan DA Bragg Slammed for Charging Daniel Penny with Murder in Subway Death Case”**
* **“Bodega Owner’s Self-Defense Case Ignites Fury” Why Did Alvin Bragg Charge Jose Alba with Murder?”**
* **“Knifepoint Robbery Charged as Misdemeanor: Bragg’s Decision Sparks Public Safety Concerns”**
* **“Bragg Slammed for Releasing Migrant Suspects in Times Square NYPD Assault Case”**
* **“Alvin Bragg Under Fire for Downgrading Anti-Semitic Assault to Misdemeanor in Times Square”**

---
Every single New Yorker knows that Bragg’s disastrous “criminal justice reforms” are only adding fuel to the fire...every single New Yorker is being forced to live with the dangerous repercussions of these policies...and every single New Yorker is right to be pissed off about it. This includes me. My name is Maud Maron. I don’t just live and work here, I’m raising my family here in Manhattan. And, **_as the mom of four public school kids_** , I am deeply troubled by what Alvin Bragg is doing to our once-great city. With over 20 years as a public defender in Manhattan and the Bronx, I understand the justice system and I will prosecute _all_ criminals regardless of their background. **_And as someone who spent 20 years as a litigator, I can unequivocally condemn Alvin Bragg’s politicized prosecution of President Trump. Bragg’s use of a “novel legal theory” to elevate a misdemeanor to a felony in President Trump’s business records case sets a very dangerous precedent and should have been laughed out of court._** What’s more, the hardworking men and women of New York City would rather see their district attorney prosecuting violent criminals, _not_ __ engaging in this sort of weaponization. That’s the reason I’m running. That’s exactly what I pledge to do. And that’s why I so urgently need your support today. **[So, can I count on you to rush me your one-time contribution of $35 today?](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z1e1pjr2ttp19oq75urflfhapqo6pgu6pqs7qr88_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g60o76chh2bs)** Like I said, Bragg has deep-pocketed billionaire backers. In fact, he’s staking his entire reelection hopes on being able to run wall-to-wall ads aimed at getting voters here to forget his abysmal record of crime, filth, and degeneracy. But keep in mind, Soros-backed district attorneys in Los Angeles (George Gascon) and San Francisco (Chesa Boudin) were soundly defeated in last year’s election. What’s more, in his first election, Bragg won with only 211,686 votes. That’s out of 1,209,469 registered voters here. That’s a very low turnout. My point? By running a grassroots campaign focused on “connecting the dots” between Alvin Bragg and the failing conditions of our city – a campaign of knocking on doors, phone calls, emails, rallies, townhalls, and the word of mouth and hard-hitting ads – **[you and I can win this race.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zei8vn1pbblckn77pam16kduqkjrglret02mqong_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g60o76chh2bs)** Even though it’s Manhattan...an area with a “deep blue” history... ...voters are willing to put safety and security for their families ahead of party affiliation – especially in district attorney races. I’m hearing and seeing confirmation of this everywhere I go out on the campaign trail. New Yorker’s are sick of being accosted every time they walk out their front door...are sick of risking their lives to ride the subway...and are sick of seeing their schools crumble. The numbers don’t lie.
---
* Over 58,000 migrants with criminal backgrounds are currently in New York City. Rather than prosecute these criminals Bragg brags about giving them “sanctuary.”
* 35% of NYC students were “chronically absent” last year and over 300,000 school children rely on the NYC subways to get to school, which means they are being subjected to violence, drug use, and displays of indecency on a daily basis.
* According to NYPD records, under Bragg, rape has jumped 7.4% across Manhattan, robbery 8.9%, felony assault 16.8% and grand larceny 29.8%.

---
Like I said at the start of my email, this is Alvin Bragg’s New York. It doesn’t have to be this way. Join me. **[Rush me your one-time $35 contribution today.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zpcg9a95f3mvbbgrfgjke5lofou8qs487le76mu0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g60o76chh2bs)** [If you can send more – say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more – it'll go a long way in our campaign to defeat Bragg this November 4th. ](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zh6i8346dbd32d9ho8puivk8pq09km842umeoig8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g60o76chh2bs)The most important factor is time. Please don’t delay. SIncerely,
---
---
**Maud Maron**

P.S. With every day that passes, New York families are confronted with more crime, more filth, more degeneracy...and more reasons to fire Alvin Bragg. With your help today, I’ll do just that. No more political prosecutions. No more treating felonies as misdemeanors. No more cashless bail. And no more siding with violent criminals over law-abiding New Yorkers. **[Please hurry, Election Day is November 4th, 2025, and I’m counting on your help to overcome Alvin Bragg’s Soros-funded campaign. There’s no time to lose.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zvg5nenodim17bfssuct0res3olcapa80882igj8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g60o76chh2bs)**
---
[ **DONATE** ](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zpl7d9omrt134j7esn2g2rd6rnbf9t6kpl85prro_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g60o76chh2bs)
---
|
---
| | PAID FOR BY MAUD FOR MANHATTAN
---
P.O. Box 274New York, NY 10013-0274
---

Pop Acta Media | First Look News
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zt6jq9fh29adu5lh5dbeqf86j67st3f15ifm7rh8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g60o76chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq6d5iepon3dtnmqpq7d9neprqastmelp3cthieip3adt7skqu2c3neior3d5medjm05plmgqb3ct66uqr695lshgm6o74s5g649fg)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zgtgn2s5ao9fm9s1recrhgp0ukb3r6qrh8hkhhho_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g60o76chh2bs)_

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: This is essential to preserve freedom
body:
There is no question that one of the Left’s most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is ignorance.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zaq56d3r7kfa8h1g262f39oo2c7cnubgfpi6taf0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g68pr1cdh2bs) Dear Friend of the Constitution, The far-Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation's history and undermine our Constitution--with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. Today, you’re receiving Hillsdale College’s **Second Amendment Survey** because you’re someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our **Second Amendment Survey** using the secure link below? [https://info.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjq8tic725aujb3lfh4aa0fu2j9ke3jruatpp9s8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g68pr1cdh2bs "https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/")

## There is a coordinated effort underway to undermine the Constitution, including the Second Amendment.
[AGREE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlrjpqkkq1dbb5ev7mnr7apqghmg6rgjh7619l8g_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g68pr1cdh2bs) [DISAGREE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo7jnmn9urv9634a66tlgevmn34qnsamce4frkjg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g68pr1cdh2bs) [NOT SURE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp375pge2fmnjpvlv5sjvunrt2grprv9sai7vjno_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g68pr1cdh2bs)
Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty—which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left’s most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is **ignorance**. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today, our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: “The Second Amendment is an expression of **first principles**.” This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. **But instead of just TALKING, it’s more important to DO something about it.** That’s why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That’s why I would like your answers to our brief **Second Amendment Survey.** You can complete the survey today at this secure link: [https://info.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zoi1ckjotlhn6vgu794e4c9ehmlj03jif9f82bm8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g68pr1cdh2bs) We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, “Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.” Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It’s also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. **Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty—including the Second Amendment—for future generations.** After completing your **Second Amendment Survey** , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed **Second Amendment Survey.** Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
**P.S.** The Second Amendment is under attack. Do you agree? Then please take our **Second Amendment Survey** at the secure link below. name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: The year was 1988 & I realized I was a Republican.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
When did you become a Republican?

| |
---
| | | | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8nb84m4de6iau7oct8t910jfpj04bvpbuoqtfhg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g68pr1c9h2bs)
---
Friend, I will admit something that might surprise you: I was a Democrat until 1988.

I grew up in the Bronx after my father came to America from Jamaica. As a teenager, I joined the Marine Corps and became a registered Democrat.

It wasn't until the 1988 Presidential Election - when I heard the candidates talking about abortion and welfare - that I realized my views were actually Republican.

We've all heard the notion from Democrats that they are the only political party that cares about folks who look like me. I believed it myself for so many years!

Once I started paying attention, I realized that the Republicans were discussing the issues that matter to me and my family. Their message of lifting folks out of poverty and giving them a chance to succeed instead of more government handouts resonated with me.

My entire adult life has been driven by personal responsibility and taking advantage of the opportunities provided to everyone in this country.

I never set out to be a politician--I spent most of my life raising my family and running a small business--but when I saw what was happening in my local community, I felt compelled to run for office.

Most people didn't give me a shot to win. I took on a 20-year incumbent in a deeply democratic district. Thankfully, I didn't listen to the chattering political class and instead took my conservative message directly to the voters--and it worked.
---
[ **GIVE WINSOME A SHOT TO WIN >>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z33qe0lus0tdlo81563r944lshrnne9615fjebqg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g68pr1c9h2bs)
---
Those conversations and connections I made during that campaign showed me that while the Democrats like to talk about the issue of race and love to demonize the Republican party, it was the policies of conservatism that resonated most in those communities.

Republicans shouldn't shy away from tough conversations about the issues that matter to folks in the communities where I grew up.

We are the party that lifts everyone from poverty and allows every person to fulfill their God-given potential. As the Lieutenant Governor of Virginia, I am not shying away from discussing those issues across the Commonwealth.

I know that may ruffle some feathers in the political establishment, but once I heard the Republican party's policies, I quickly realized that they aligned with my values.

Please join me in my campaign for Governor and help ensure we spread our message to every community nationwide. Republicans should be proud of our record and values - and it's up to all of us to ensure we leave no voter behind.

_**[_**I would be grateful if you could contribute $25, $50, or even $100 to help fund our efforts over the next few months.**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztiav8rae8th4fdt5el4ohslm8dj4li9k5hp0dao_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g68pr1c9h2bs)**_
---
[ **CHIP IN $25 >>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmgfhvf3jreo5462834djbfga5u8p1m18e7i2o7g_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g68pr1c9h2bs)
---
[ **CHIP IN $50 >>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zv0esa5so1sk0up7pc04iaco1j8qjv3172fbb630_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g68pr1c9h2bs)
---
[ **CHIP IN $100 >>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zeej99qqbg7cu30kc646jl4jv6bjr3mmhtr3ffko_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g68pr1c9h2bs)
---
[ **CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT >>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfk5ca451v7217dquelku9v1e579d3u3p2aj87uo_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g68pr1c9h2bs)

name: Defend Our Courts
subject: Click to cancel
body:
Not only are we fighting back against Trump, we are also fighting against the billionaires who back him.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018I7vKUsfQtL1UcQ5XV5QRc7q7DUKbRsh_3Ilrkp7tSIeP7P2iefrTWAw_-9CWRkiRqYI9T0DS6c79xQOTRW3KtlTtd7sLt1SQRersAU0qU18rbKnvqXyd7N2vxToWSJgrD9XtX1dhYcIYF_5y7PCCM5NKqADD2frlE-MjLDpUWzBFbGrD2nPrCNWubng3XcDwn0_a7s4r2L4Q7P6FfBDKPzRDMQbbIX1&c=4dU4aljUHQIUuQJ_C_3Z7ZHWENGY0C_waKa--9_mfuEnDbDevnVzVw==&ch=vxUePo7FoVIbNsS-WDlr-rrgdgGbOW6KXuQpScWMVNf6q6vD0TqWTA==)
---
| Peter,
Defend Our Courts has been focused on Trump's attempts to take over state Supreme Courts in key swing states and the dire threat it poses to our democracy. But MAGA billionaires bankrolling these efforts aren't just acting in Trump's best interest, but their own interests too.
Lina Khan, the former FTC Chair under Biden, fought for the simplest of reforms to help make America more affordable and to stop corporations and billionaires from ripping the American people off. But MAGA judges sided with the billionaires, allowing them to keep using shady business practices to withdraw money from your bank account every month.
---
| | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018I7vKUsfQtL1UcQ5XV5QRc7q7DUKbRsh_3Ilrkp7tSIeP7P2iefrTWAw_-9CWRkiRqYI9T0DS6c79xQOTRW3KtlTtd7sLt1SQRersAU0qU18rbKnvqXyd7N2vxToWSJgrD9XtX1dhYcIYF_5y7PCCM5NKqADD2frlE-MjLDpUWzBFbGrD2nPrCNWubng3XcDwn0_a7s4r2L4Q7P6FfBDKAY0HRXwlSs_&c=4dU4aljUHQIUuQJ_C_3Z7ZHWENGY0C_waKa--9_mfuEnDbDevnVzVw==&ch=vxUePo7FoVIbNsS-WDlr-rrgdgGbOW6KXuQpScWMVNf6q6vD0TqWTA==)
---
|
Trump poses an unprecedented threat to our nation's democracy on multiple fronts, but his economic policy has been revealed as just another typical Republican administration--stealing from the poor & middle class to give to the rich. The recent cuts to Medicaid are proof of that, ending healthcare coverage for 17 million Americans to fund tax cuts for the billionaires who backed him.
Not only are we fighting back against Trump, we are also fighting against the billionaires who back him. And right now, they are spending millions to take down the three Democratic justices on the Pennsylvania Supreme Court in their 2025 retention election.
If they flip the court, they'll install judges who serve them, not the people. Defend Our Courts is ringing the alarm bells and mobilizing to protect the Democratic majority on the PA Supreme Court and ensure voters, not billionaires, decide our future. But we can't do this alone.
[Will you help Defend Our Courts fight back against the billionaires trying to buy the PA state Supreme Court by contributing $5, $10, or even $50?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018I7vKUsfQtL1UcQ5XV5QRc7q7DUKbRsh_3Ilrkp7tSIeP7P2iefrTWAw_-9CWRkiRqYI9T0DS6c79xQOTRW3KtlTtd7sLt1SQRersAU0qU18rbKnvqXyd7N2vxToWSJgrD9XtX1dhYcIYF_5y7PCCM5NKqADD2frlE-MjLDpUWzBFbGrD2nPrCNWubng3XcDwn0_a7s4r2L4Q7P6FfBDKFxaJ0vmW4Ww&c=4dU4aljUHQIUuQJ_C_3Z7ZHWENGY0C_waKa--9_mfuEnDbDevnVzVw==&ch=vxUePo7FoVIbNsS-WDlr-rrgdgGbOW6KXuQpScWMVNf6q6vD0TqWTA==)

clean_body: Not only are we fighting back against Trump, we are also fighting against the billionaires who back him. | | | | | == | Peter, Defend Our Courts has been focused on Trump's attempts to take over state Supreme Courts in key swing states and the dire threat it poses to our democracy. But MAGA billionaires bankrolling these efforts aren't just acting in Trump's best interest, but their own interests too. Lina Khan, the former FTC Chair under Biden, fought for the simplest of reforms to help make America more affordable and to stop corporations and billionaires from ripping the American people off. But MAGA judges sided with the billionaires, allowing them to keep using shady business practices to withdraw money from your bank account every month. | | == | Trump poses an unprecedented threat to our nation's democracy on multiple fronts, but his economic policy has been revealed as just another typical Republican administration--stealing from the poor & middle class to give to the rich. The recent cuts to Medicaid are proof of that, ending healthcare coverage for 17 million Americans to fund tax cuts for the billionaires who backed him. Not only are we fighting back against Trump, we are also fighting against the billionaires who back him. And right now, they are spending millions to take down the three Democratic justices on the Pennsylvania Supreme Court in their 2025 retention election. If they flip the court, they'll install judges who serve them, not the people. Defend Our Courts is ringing the alarm bells and mobilizing to protect the Democratic majority on the PA Supreme Court and ensure voters, not billionaires, decide our future. But we can't do this alone. == | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | | | | == Thank you for your continued support, Defend Our Courts Fighting for Justice. Friend, Democrats are trying to pull a fast one in Nebraska.

Dan Osborn, a fake "Independent" just announced he's running for Senate against NRSC Vice Chair Pete Ricketts.

This guy calls himself an independent, but he's fully backed by Chuck Schumer and the Democrat machine. If he's in the Senate, he'll do everything he can to cripple President Trump's agenda.

Dear Patriot, ** ** ************ Across the country, Radical Leftists have taken to the streets to declare that America has no king. These violent protesters have the **audacity** to claim that President Donald Trump is a tyrant!
We know that the lawfully-elected President is not a king, but there is a group of despots who Americans should be worried about.
The real kings running America into the ground are the **CORRUPT LEFTIST AND RINO FEDERAL JUDGES** who twist and distort the Constitution to stop the will of the people and strip us of our sacred rights.
It's time we call it for what it is: **A FEDERAL JUDICIAL COUP**
The America-First agenda won in 2024, but every attempt by this administration to save our country is being thwarted by corrupt leftist federal judges. They are desperate to strip the executive of his constitutional powers!

No-Name Leftist Federal Judges are popping up out of nowhere with an evil agenda:
**🚨End deportations** ******🚨Resume funding to the Deep State** ******🚨Stop election security measures**
But when you've dedicated your life to suing Democrat traitors like Hillary Clinton, Barack Obama, George Soros - and even the leaders of the **Black Lives Matter** movement - you stop being afraid of the Marxists and learn to **FIGHT WITH PASSION**.
Allow me to introduce myself:
My name is **Larry Klayman**. I'm a lawyer who is proud to be the biggest pain the Clintons and Bidens have ever faced.
My nonprofit, **Freedom Watch USA** , exposes and prosecutes domestic and foreign corruption. These are just some of the traitors we are up against:
**Judge William Orrick** \- an Obama-worshipping Californian who issued a satanic injunction to protect sanctuary cities that harbor illegal alien murderers and rapists.
**Judges Paula Xinis & Stephanie Gallagher** - two open-border radicals who ordered illegal gang member Kilmar Abrego Garcia be brought back to America after being lawfully deported by the Trump administration,
**Judge Hannah Dugan** - a Milwaukee leftist who escorted an illegal alien out of her court room so that he could escape ICE arrest and deportation.

**It begs the question:** **Who are these federal judges working for?**

These crazed leftist and RINO federal judges **must** be impeached and prosecuted for repeatedly violating their oaths of office.
That's why we need **YOUR HELP!**
Freedom Watch is leading the peaceful and legal fight to prosecute them, just like we did with the Clintons, the Bidens, and Anthony Fauci.
We just cannot do it without the support of patriots like **YOU.**
With **YOUR** financial support behind us, Freedom Watch will embark on a **RELENTLESS CRUSADE** to expose these judicial traitors, their corrupt ties, and their **BRAZEN** political activism in the federal courts.
Will you rush back your **END THE FEDERAL JUDICIAL COUP** urgent reply with $35 or more to lead this fight with us?
Right now, we are fighting an uphill battle against the **DARKEST** , most powerful stronghold of the Deep State.
In fact, only EIGHT judges have been impeached in 247 YEARS!
The last to be impeached was Alcee Hastings for bribery, but the **SHAMELESS** Democrats made him a member of Congress instead!
It's clear that the Leftist plan to take over America was hatched in the dark corners of the judiciary.
Now, it's all coming to light as they fight tooth and nail to stop the America-First agenda.
There are hundreds of crooked leftist federal judges waiting in the wings for their turn to stop the will of the American people and destroy our constitutional republic.
That's why it's **CRUCIAL** that you don't leave this message unanswered.
My team and I are up against a **BILLIONAIRE-BACKED LEFTIST HORDE** , and our resources are being stretched to their breaking point. But your $35 donation in the next 48 hours can change that.

clean_body: Will you DEFEND Pres. Trump’s agenda? | | | Dear Patriot, ********** Across the country, Radical Leftists have taken to the streets to declare that America has no king. These violent protesters have the audacity to claim that President Donald Trump is a tyrant! We know that the lawfully-elected President is not a king, but there is a group of despots who Americans should be worried about. The real kings running America into the ground are the CORRUPT LEFTIST AND RINO FEDERAL JUDGES who twist and distort the Constitution to stop the will of the people and strip us of our sacred rights. It's time we call it for what it is: A FEDERAL JUDICIAL COUP The America-First agenda won in 2024, but every attempt by this administration to save our country is being thwarted by corrupt leftist federal judges. They are desperate to strip the executive of his constitutional powers! No-Name Leftist Federal Judges are popping up out of nowhere with an evil agenda: 🚨End deportations **🚨Resume funding to the Deep State ****🚨Stop election security measures But when you've dedicated your life to suing Democrat traitors like Hillary Clinton, Barack Obama, George Soros - and even the leaders of the Black Lives Matter movement - you stop being afraid of the Marxists and learn to FIGHT WITH PASSION. Allow me to introduce myself: My name is Larry Klayman. I'm a lawyer who is proud to be the biggest pain the Clintons and Bidens have ever faced. My nonprofit, Freedom Watch USA , exposes and prosecutes domestic and foreign corruption. These are just some of the traitors we are up against: Judge William Orrick \- an Obama-worshipping Californian who issued a satanic injunction to protect sanctuary cities that harbor illegal alien murderers and rapists. Judges Paula Xinis & Stephanie Gallagher - two open-border radicals who ordered illegal gang member Kilmar Abrego Garcia be brought back to America after being lawfully deported by the Trump administration, Judge Hannah Dugan - a Milwaukee leftist who escorted an illegal alien out of her court room so that he could escape ICE arrest and deportation. It begs the question: Who are these federal judges working for? These crazed leftist and RINO federal judges must be impeached and prosecuted for repeatedly violating their oaths of office. That's why we need YOUR HELP! Freedom Watch is leading the peaceful and legal fight to prosecute them, just like we did with the Clintons, the Bidens, and Anthony Fauci. name: Maud Maron
subject: Help me defeat Alvin Bragg
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAUD FOR MANHATTAN
body:
He weaponized his office and infamously fabricated a “novel legal theory” to charge President Trump with 34 felonies.

| | |
---
---
| | My Dear Friend,**[Will you help me defeat Alvin Bragg?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgmnuaih0mndnf9vhvi6ci04pa5hfmempl4j8o70_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g6apj4cjh2bs)** He is the poster child of a Soros-backed district attorney. He weaponized his office and infamously fabricated a “ _novel legal theory_ ” to charge President Trump with 34 felonies. He brought New York City to its knees with soft-on-crime policies like “cashless bail.” And he prosecuted Daniel Penny the veteran and hero who risked his life to protect a subway car full of innocent New Yorkers from a menacing vagrant with a violent criminal past. **Make no mistake, Bragg and his fellow leftists would export this vision to your hometown in a ‘**** _New York minute_****’ if given the chance.** I’ll stop right there. If you find yourself thinking: _Say no more, Maud! I agree Alvin Bragg is not only a threat to New York City but to all Americans, and must be defeated..._ **[Then, by all means, skip the rest of this letter and go right to your DEFEAT ALVIN BRAGG Emergency reply form and send it in to me today.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1h9rgq9a3bdjh4nag8trgt004c84vekekklpuu0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g6apj4cjh2bs)** But if you’d like to hear the litany of reasons to defeat Alvin Bragg or hear some more about my own background and why I am such a clear contrast and a clear threat to Bragg, then read on. It’ll come as no surprise to you that I’m asking for your financial support today to overcome Alvin Bragg and his Soros network of billionaire backers. He has been richly rewarded for prosecuting President Trump. His without a doubt the “darling” of the radical Left and a “folk hero” amongst the establishment media who are all too happy to wipe Bragg’s fingerprints off every story related to crime and squalor in New York City. You want to know the worst part about the decay happening here on Alvin Bragg’s watch? It is all by design. His actions are intentionally driving this violent crime streak:
---
* **“Manhattan DA Bragg Slammed for Charging Daniel Penny with Murder in Subway Death Case”**
* **“Bodega Owner’s Self-Defense Case Ignites Fury” Why Did Alvin Bragg Charge Jose Alba with Murder?”**
* **“Knifepoint Robbery Charged as Misdemeanor: Bragg’s Decision Sparks Public Safety Concerns”**
* **“Bragg Slammed for Releasing Migrant Suspects in Times Square NYPD Assault Case”**
* **“Alvin Bragg Under Fire for Downgrading Anti-Semitic Assault to Misdemeanor in Times Square”**

---
Every single New Yorker knows that Bragg’s disastrous “criminal justice reforms” are only adding fuel to the fire...every single New Yorker is being forced to live with the dangerous repercussions of these policies...and every single New Yorker is right to be pissed off about it. This includes me. My name is Maud Maron. I don’t just live and work here, I’m raising my family here in Manhattan. And, **_as the mom of four public school kids_** , I am deeply troubled by what Alvin Bragg is doing to our once-great city. With over 20 years as a public defender in Manhattan and the Bronx, I understand the justice system and I will prosecute _all_ criminals regardless of their background. **_And as someone who spent 20 years as a litigator, I can unequivocally condemn Alvin Bragg’s politicized prosecution of President Trump. Bragg’s use of a “novel legal theory” to elevate a misdemeanor to a felony in President Trump’s business records case sets a very dangerous precedent and should have been laughed out of court._** What’s more, the hardworking men and women of New York City would rather see their district attorney prosecuting violent criminals, _not_ __ engaging in this sort of weaponization. That’s the reason I’m running. That’s exactly what I pledge to do. And that’s why I so urgently need your support today. **[So, can I count on you to rush me your one-time contribution of $35 today?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmetmgm10ujp7mqncen88tfvdnjcrek7rvvtl2a8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g6apj4cjh2bs)** Like I said, Bragg has deep-pocketed billionaire backers. In fact, he’s staking his entire reelection hopes on being able to run wall-to-wall ads aimed at getting voters here to forget his abysmal record of crime, filth, and degeneracy. But keep in mind, Soros-backed district attorneys in Los Angeles (George Gascon) and San Francisco (Chesa Boudin) were soundly defeated in last year’s election. What’s more, in his first election, Bragg won with only 211,686 votes. That’s out of 1,209,469 registered voters here. That’s a very low turnout. My point? By running a grassroots campaign focused on “connecting the dots” between Alvin Bragg and the failing conditions of our city – a campaign of knocking on doors, phone calls, emails, rallies, townhalls, and the word of mouth and hard-hitting ads – **[you and I can win this race.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1641d5jkjts5cum9nsoaft9d99hvu05ps80v0uo_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g6apj4cjh2bs)** Even though it’s Manhattan...an area with a “deep blue” history... ...voters are willing to put safety and security for their families ahead of party affiliation – especially in district attorney races. I’m hearing and seeing confirmation of this everywhere I go out on the campaign trail. New Yorker’s are sick of being accosted every time they walk out their front door...are sick of risking their lives to ride the subway...and are sick of seeing their schools crumble. The numbers don’t lie.
---
* Over 58,000 migrants with criminal backgrounds are currently in New York City. Rather than prosecute these criminals Bragg brags about giving them “sanctuary.”
* 35% of NYC students were “chronically absent” last year and over 300,000 school children rely on the NYC subways to get to school, which means they are being subjected to violence, drug use, and displays of indecency on a daily basis.
* According to NYPD records, under Bragg, rape has jumped 7.4% across Manhattan, robbery 8.9%, felony assault 16.8% and grand larceny 29.8%.

---
Like I said at the start of my email, this is Alvin Bragg’s New York. It doesn’t have to be this way. Join me. **[Rush me your one-time $35 contribution today.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zu6a2mp8aqgmd5o8vsc32i9eh9tisb6ipiu8cedo_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g6apj4cjh2bs)** [If you can send more – say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more – it'll go a long way in our campaign to defeat Bragg this November 4th. ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpqvedb2g0g734rf6njln7nll0qv94fb5a5ts8kg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g6apj4cjh2bs)The most important factor is time. Please don’t delay. SIncerely,
---
---
**Maud Maron**

P.S. With every day that passes, New York families are confronted with more crime, more filth, more degeneracy...and more reasons to fire Alvin Bragg. With your help today, I’ll do just that. No more political prosecutions. No more treating felonies as misdemeanors. No more cashless bail. And no more siding with violent criminals over law-abiding New Yorkers. **[Please hurry, Election Day is November 4th, 2025, and I’m counting on your help to overcome Alvin Bragg’s Soros-funded campaign. There’s no time to lose.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zms206ag2chati4pant984q92h3r7mk7nej2ncp8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g6apj4cjh2bs)**
---
[ **DONATE** ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zj4rvb5rmmaqai6p7bq400pq0user3siijrpvu10_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g6apj4cjh2bs)
---

name: James O'Keefe
subject: I’ve Risked Everything for the Truth– Will You Stand with Me?
body:
There have been nights when I’ve questioned if it’s worth it. The legal bills, the threats, the constant pressure—it takes a toll. I’ve sacrificed relationships, financial security, and my own safety. But then I think of the lives we’ve touched. Like the voters who saw our exposés on election and Voter ID fraud, leading to new laws in multiple states.

| [****](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zq49vrmptsnprchj15847f1tt3ntleqbubiv3da0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g66oj4c9h2bs)
[****](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2ztkinbnuume7gou587fch8gr7623i3c8it9ak8qg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g66oj4c9h2bs) Dear Patriot,

I'm James O'Keefe, and I'm writing to you not just as a journalist, but as someone who's poured his heart, soul, and life into a mission that's bigger than me.

For over 15 years, I've fought to expose the truth--about corruption, fraud, and the powerful who think they can hide in the shadows. It's been a journey of sacrifice, risk, and relentless determination, and I'm asking you to [**join me in this fight by supporting**O 'Keefe Media Group****](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zkhgjjnv88lhsq2bqsgqluiv24cm8hlju761r0fo_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g66oj4c9h2bs).

Picture me in 2009, a kid from Westwood, New Jersey, with nothing but a cheap camera and a fire in my belly.

I grew up in a family that taught me to work hard and stand for what's right, but I had no money, no connections, just a belief that the American people deserved to know what was happening behind closed doors.

I maxed out credit cards to buy plane tickets and equipment, [**racking up $50,000 in debt for one investigation alone --exposing NPR's bias in 2011**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z7937rdv2vm52golbije5cm6bn5asd1ketmn92o0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g66oj4c9h2bs).

I'd lie awake at night, wondering how I'd pay it off, but I kept going because I knew the truth was worth it.

A few years before that in 2009, I got my big break. I went undercover at ACORN, a group funded by your tax dollars. Posing as a pimp and with an undercover journalist posing as a prostitute, we caught employees on hidden camera offering advice on dodging taxes and running illegal operations. The videos hit like a thunderbolt--**Congress cut ACORN 's funding, and the organization collapsed**.

It was proof that one person could change the game. But it also painted a target on my back. The powerful don't like being exposed**, and they 've been coming for me ever since**.

**[**Will you help me keep exposing the truth?**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z4aah0snohvh0jdlml472uv8ao4dkdh6ta88ln5o_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g66oj4c9h2bs)**

I need to raise **$28,400 as soon as possible** to fund our July operations, cover travel for our next sting, and pay our team. [**Your gift of $25, $50, or $100 will keep our cameras rolling and our mission alive. Donate now.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z0988b0eq6ep5t22jca650cg2vm9esipqhhfr788_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g66oj4c9h2bs)

In 2010, I faced one of my darkest moments.

I was arrested for entering Senator Mary Landrieu's office, investigating claims she was ignoring constituents during the healthcare debate. Despite showing my ID went I entered the building, I was still charged for entering a federal building under false pretenses.

The government slapped me with felony charges, and I spent a night in a jail cell, [**staring at the walls, wondering if my dream was over.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z9fja4prpa36djkq2rq08kj97rqatsftfeiveakg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g66oj4c9h2bs)

I was 25, facing years in prison, and the media painted me as a villain. But I thought of the people counting on me--the Americans who deserved to know the truth--and I refused to give up.

I pleaded guilty to a misdemeanor, got three years of probation, 100 hours of community service, and a $1,500 fine. **Even on probation, I didn 't stop**. I built a team of citizen journalists and kept digging, exposing voter fraud and media bias while under the government's thumb.

That resilience paid off. In 2011, we released videos that forced NPR's CEO and executives to resign, revealing their bias to the world.

In 2014, I crossed the Rio Grande dressed as Osama bin Laden to expose border security failures, sparking a U.S. Senate investigation. My mentor, Andrew Breitbart, called me "one of the great journalists," and **Rush Limbaugh said our NPR sting was a "grand slam."**

But every victory came with a cost--more lawsuits, more threats, more attempts to silence me.

**[**Your support can keep this fight alive**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zpr6thps6g3qeba8vo4u0gb9kc6b7j929cqq6rm8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g66oj4c9h2bs)****.** We're the only ones exposing the bureaucrats undermining our Republic, and we need **$28,400 by in days** to continue. [**A donation of $50 or $200 will fund our next investigation and protect our work from activist lawsuits**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zvrih3vc9r6dgsqls5jk8fq5hjrle98i3gm78690_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g66oj4c9h2bs).

The hardest blow came in 2021.

**I woke up to the FBI pounding on my door in Mamaroneck, New York, raiding my home over a diary allegedly belonging to President Biden 's daughter. **

They took my phones, my computers, everything--trying to scare me into submission.

I stood in my apartment, watching them tear through my life, and felt the weight of their power.

But I also felt a fire inside me.

If they were coming this hard, it meant I was hitting a nerve.

I refused to back down, speaking out on Fox News with Sean Hannity, declaring, "This is an attack on the First Amendment." That moment strengthened my resolve to keep fighting, no matter the odds.

The lawsuits have been relentless.

From ACORN employees to activist attorneys, I've faced legal battles that would break most people. Even my own organization, Project Veritas, sued me in 2023, alleging financial mismanagement after I founded O'Keefe Media Group.

They tried to bury me, but I kept going, **because the truth is bigger than any one fight.**

**[**I need you now more than ever**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zb1t0thvfjh2udceuemhfp2ubk62d37h6fqq2ifo_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g66oj4c9h2bs)****.** Summer donations are down, and [**we must raise**$28,400 within days** to keep exposing corruption. **](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zojukpsh0s3sqa2umv4meqdgl01f8tkh611mfpmo_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g66oj4c9h2bs)

[**Your gift of $25 or $75 will help us train citizen journalists and fight back against those trying to silence us. Donate today.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zmpfrcfq62j3orbpn3dhvqaof2irijc4a2580b2o_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g66oj4c9h2bs)

There have been nights when I've questioned if it's worth it.

The legal bills, the threats, the constant pressure--it takes a toll.

I've sacrificed relationships, financial security, and my own safety.

But then I think of the lives we've touched. Like the voters who saw our exposes on election and Voter ID fraud, leading to new laws in multiple states.

Or the families who benefited when we exposed Medicaid incompetence, forcing retraining. Every time I feel like giving up, I remember why I started: **because the American people deserve a government that serves them, not one that hides behind lies.**

With **O 'Keefe Media Group**, I'm building a legacy.

We're not just reporting news--we're training an army of citizen journalists to carry the torch. Our recent work has exposed media cover-ups, government waste, and corporate greed, sparking firings and policy reviews. But we're not done.

The bureaucrats undermining President Trump's agenda, wasting your tax dollars, and pushing their own agendas are still out there. **We 're the only ones holding them accountable with hidden cameras and fearless journalism.**

**[**Will you stand with me?**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2za9f0v6bpkv1pvh64dpss1ai28tbjvehkifsd6c0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g66oj4c9h2bs)**

[**We need**$28,400 within days** to keep going. **](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zt9urdb9t0rtd7rd6c3416plujnsk1f2itsb6uq8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g66oj4c9h2bs)

[**Your donation of $50, $100, or $500 is a direct blow against corruption, ensuring the truth reaches millions.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z6vjahfqjddvl11dn7htj13vu1avb3iijgl2fua8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g66oj4c9h2bs)

I'm not an activist. I'm a journalist, driven by an obsession to uncover what the powerful want hidden.

The mainstream media won't do it--they're too busy protecting the elites.

But I've never backed down, and I never will. I've risked everything for this mission, and I'm asking you to join me.

Your support isn't just a donation--[**it 's a lifeline**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z9i91ufbea5l64he0q453s4dj6i5o8qvhce49blo_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g66oj4c9h2bs).

It's a statement that you believe in truth, transparency, **and the fight for our Republic**.

Please, if my story moves you, if you believe in what we're doing, [**donate today**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2ztqgkivedsev58r6olvnh36l37a56tu9ar6s627o_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g66oj4c9h2bs). [**We 're down to the wire, and every dollar counts. **](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zf9j1fd8su7t3jan3h8vjnki1ojggmi4bq420208_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5g66oj4c9h2bs)

Together, we can keep **exposing the truth and holding the powerful accountable**.

Thanks for standing with me,
James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: Does Harvard have a right to your money?
body:
Did you know that the Trump administration froze over $2.2 billion in taxpayer funds for Harvard University?

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmvpa7chjmu8fmbe10n53d43r0l06nsu5fd5rgjg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5i68or2cph2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend of Liberty,

Did you know that the Trump administration froze over $2.2 billion in taxpayer funds for Harvard University?

Now Harvard thinks it has a CONSTITUTIONAL RIGHT to your money. Clearly, the people who run it didn't receive a Hillsdale College education.

If they had, they would know they have no right to your money. Your money shouldn't go to antisemitic, anti-American, and anti-Western Civilization bureaucrats and activists.

And if they had taken our free online course, "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution," they'd understand that a truly free society requires education to be independent of unaccountable administrative agencies.

**As you may know, Hillsdale College doesn 't take a single cent of federal funds.** Unlike Harvard, we know there are rules that come with federal money. And we prefer to make an honest living.

And this makes us unique in American higher education. So many elite institutions--like Harvard--receive millions, if not billions, of your tax dollars.

**By contrast, our supporters give to us because they want to. **

We would rather stand by our principles than receive a taxpayer handout--no matter who is in the White House.

But this is only possible because we have friends like you. Thanks to you--and so many other informed patriots--we don't receive federal or state student grants or loans. Nothing.

[**That 's why I hope you will consider making a tax-deductible gift to our Annual Fund today to help Hillsdale College expand its outreach efforts on behalf of liberty**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1obich4jchqc88ejj6i96905oitc9014l1adeq0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5i68or2cph2bs)**.**

You will help us expand the production of our free online courses, increase the readership of _Imprimis_ , and launch increasing numbers of Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 schools nationwide.

Your generous support of our educational outreach programs will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens.

There's an important reason why Hillsdale refuses to accept one penny of government funding.

This allows the College to remain **genuinely independent** and focused on its mission, free from burdensome and corrupting federal regulations.

**It 's a lesson Harvard University would do well to learn. **

All of our work--including our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--is entirely dependent on the support of citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

The upcoming academic year will be critical, and the Left will pull out all the stops to keep its stranglehold on our schools.

It will take significant resources to promote our online courses--such as our recent course, "The Federalist"--while also expanding Hillsdale's other educational outreach efforts.

I'm asking you to make a tax-deductible gift to our Annual Fund today. Many of our most faithful supporters give gifts of **$25** or **$50** , while others give gifts of **$100** , **$500** , or even more.

What's most important is that you give what you can. I've included a secure, convenient link for you here:

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/annual-fund-2025**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zot1qf5k0bpev5o4es557g5v17u74ie3dgj7j4jg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5i68or2cph2bs)

Thank you again for your partnership in our shared mission to revive and preserve liberty and the American way of life.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| |
---

Pop Acta Media | Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z7a5hbdlq3egnj5e6avb88th2nhthrqtr6tom23o_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5i68or2cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq9ttle9q3bd9ieir38ct3mkrnctt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8ob3c3ie1pr24no)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z10lqodd3oktc968muql60apvfvmkioo7v0d5qp0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c5i68or2cph2bs)_

name: Troy Downing HQ
subject: American Energy = American Security.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
We cannot afford to rely on our enemies for fuel. It’s time to unleash American energy, and we need your voice in the fight.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)Peter,

This year, the U.S. is projected to produce **_200,000 more barrels of oil per day_** than we did under Biden.

That didn’t happen by chance. _It happened because President Trump refused to back down_.
The Left tried to shut down pipelines, bury producers in regulations, and make us dependent on nations like Russia and Iran. **But President Trump made one thing clear:_America comes FIRST!_**
While Joe Biden catered to climate extremists and foreign interests, we fought to protect American jobs, American energy, and American strength.
[But we CANNOT take our foot off the gas. We CANNOT afford to rely on our enemies for fuel. It’s time to unleash American energy, and we need your voice in the fight >>](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)[TAKE THE AMERICAN ENERGY SURVEY TODAY
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._g)We need 5,000 patriots to stand up before midnight and take our**[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)[ Unleashing American Energy Survey.](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)**
Let’s Make America __Energy Dominant__ Again.
Best,Team Downing| |

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. body:
President Trump announced on Saturday that he will [levy tariffs of 30%](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL-OszAQxJ8GOqLdxWBcuPiadPnaK5H_rINPBiPjJJe3P3G6N7huRiPN6Dcft_lmYorb_b9ZWdeQ541fR-JauZyymhJDOMy25cfm2O9LMQfPBDR0IDvsZ29ies-i9TowE_cta5QDCUAk0S5aCQ9ukGYUnlG5iRyYoKQUQEBoQxv12QYSewQYUF0GawFVwN4osBMNjQD2seZy-cxxqwuH9M5PLheX1zbppdb9aPp_DV0bupr9BDij05QaXeKGrrU81r37pen40a38FV3uxtGGSXglvfOjstZjQISJBdHUm-Dbov3-iinFY5SNgPtqYvoZrn9666npOwAA__8eDH0A) against the European Union and Mexico beginning August 1.
