name: Jon Ossoff
subject: Yesterday’s rally in Savannah
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

[](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-july25.vLE_dc&refcode=em250713-1-f&t=1&akid=546%2E5691347%2Eg2YWTp)
Yesterday I rallied a crowd in Savannah to oppose this Administration’s unprecedented attack on our constitution and the rule of law.
([**You can watch my speech here on YouTube.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/2564?t=2&akid=546%2E5691347%2Eg2YWTp))
Here’s what I said:
Hello Savannah! Thank you all so much for being here.
First, I want to thank all of the law enforcement keeping us safe today. Thank you to Savannah PD and all the security staff.
And I want to ask all of our veterans in the room to raise your hand up high and be honored by all of us. Thank you for your service.
Now Savannah, I'm here with a report from our nation’s capital – and it’s not good news.
It turns out... when Donald Trump said he was going to fight for working class Americans... what he *really* meant was: He’s going to take away your health care to cut taxes for the rich.
Now you may remember — we were told this was a different Republican Party.
We were told Donald Trump’s new GOP cared about working people.
But you can’t claim to be for working men and women... when you defund their hospitals and nursing homes.
You can’t claim to be for working men and women... when you defund school lunch programs to help feed little boys and little girls... whose hard-working parents are struggling to fill the fridge.
You can’t claim to be for working men and women... when you do these things so you can cut taxes for the richest people in the country.
There was a Republican Senator with the integrity to oppose this. Thom Tillis, of North Carolina. Did you see that?
He was on the Senate floor, pleading with Republicans to do the right thing.
Senator Tillis warned that 663,000 North Carolinians will be pushed off Medicaid.
He warned President Trump was breaking his promises.
He took a stand and he voted against the bill.
And they ran him right out of the Republican Party.
It took courage, what Sen. Tillis did.
Among the Republicans who represent Georgia in Congress... no such courage.
Just: “Yes sir, no sir, Mr. Trump.”
Let me tell you what it was like in Washington these last six months.
See, we had the leaders of Georgia’s clinics and hospitals and nursing homes, caregivers for seniors and the disabled, nurses and doctors, teachers and school principals, the folks who run food pantries — they all came up to Washington, and they begged Georgia’s representatives in Congress... they said, please don’t do this, it’s going to be devastating for health care and seniors and kids.
Sen. Warnock and I listened. We fought that bill, and we voted No.
We put Georgia first.
But every Republican member of Congress who is supposed to represent Georgia put loyalty to Trump over loyalty to our state.
They’re destroying the Medicaid program when 40% of all kids in Georgia are covered by Medicaid. 50% of all births in Georgia are covered by Medicaid. 70% of all seniors in nursing homes are covered by Medicaid.
37 Georgia nursing homes are at risk of closure because of this law — seven of them are less than a two hour drive from here.
Remember what President Trump said about Medicaid? “We’re not going to touch it.” Direct quote.
Like Senator Tillis said – a broken promise.
One of many.
President Trump promised to end the wars.
He promised to release the Epstein files.
Did anyone really think the sexual predator president who used to party with Jeffrey Epstein was going to release the Epstein files?
So many broken promises.
More people are unemployed. The wars are still raging. Oil drilling is slowing down. The debt is exploding. Prices are going up.
The other day I was watching part of an interview with Marjorie Taylor Greene.
Which... you never know what you’re going to get.
But just a few weeks ago, she said of the Trump Administration, she said, “We” (as in, MAGA), Marjorie said “we’ve been in power for six months. And I was so excited in the beginning thinking there’s nothing we can’t do.” Then Marjorie said, “But six months in, “there’s literally nothing that we can do.”
Well, they have done one thing. They’ve destroyed Medicaid and defunded hospitals and added four trillion dollars to the debt to cut taxes for the rich.
And by the way, Marjorie, it’s not too late to run for Senate. Don’t listen to the polls. You can do it!
(I believe in you.)
4 trillion dollars — that’s trillion, with a T — to the national debt.
I don’t want to hear another Republican Member of Congress ever again pretend they care about deficits and debt.
These cowards and hypocrites in the Freedom Caucus, they make their entire fake personas about cutting deficits. Then they get threatened with a primary and they fold for a Big Mac on Air Force One.
So now our kids, and our kids’ kids, and their grandkids have four trillion dollars more debt to pay down. And it’s not even like it’s for a good cause. It’s so someone worth $50 million can buy another vacation home to visit once a year.
Meanwhile, there are plenty of things that are worth public investment.
I would like one of my Republican colleagues to explain why an American family has to pay $3,000 to ride a few miles in an ambulance to the hospital...
...when we’re handing out million dollar tax breaks to the wealthiest people in the country?
Or why they’re cancelling the projects that can actually make a difference for hard-working people in our state.
Do you all know Thomasville, Georgia?
Just a few miles from the Florida line. Small, rural. Thomasville’s never gotten much love from Washington. They’re short health care options. Infrastructure’s old. So a couple years back, we allocated federal funds to help them build a new health clinic and upgrade their sewers.
Health clinics and sewers didn’t used to be controversial.
But then out of nowhere the Trump Administration cancelled the grant. Y’all know why?
First, because the project had the word “justice” in it, And “justice” is now a forbidden word.
Second, because a tiny amount of the grant was for electric lawnmowers, to maintain the new facilities. And electric vehicles, which were supposed to be Georgia’s economic future, are now considered woke.
So no more health clinic and sewer upgrades for Thomasville.
See, they’re all wrapped up in this right-wing internet ideology. Battery powered lawnmowers make them feel unsafe. Diversity and justice are too triggering.
These are the guys who were going to end cancel culture.
Now they’re trying to cancel Big Bird.
No literally, they are trying to cancel Big Bird. We’re voting next week on their bill to defund public television. They are boldly standing up to Elmo and the Deep State Woke Mob.
Do you remember when JD Vance gave a whole big lecture to foreign leaders in Europe about free speech?
Now JD Vance will throw you in a Homeland Security dungeon for writing an op-ed he doesn’t like.
What’s happening to our country right now should chill us to the bone.
The use of official power to intimidate and destroy critics and political opponents, law firms, and universities. A government that openly defies the courts while federal troops police our cities.
A President threatening to strip Americans of their citizenship and send them to foreign prisons.
Before you elected me, I led a team that exposed corruption and war crimes all over the world.
We worked in places where criticizing the government is dangerous,
where whistleblowers and witnesses have to meet in secret,
where protest carries the risk of prosecution.
Savannah: when the federal police are wearing masks and refusing to identify themselves, that’s a bad sign.
Fear is the currency of tyranny.
I've heard it from people at every level. Including powerful people, people with status and resources.
They come to my office and tell me they’re afraid to say anything.
They’re afraid of retribution, investigation, destruction.
Vengeance from their own government.
Donald Trump wants the whole country to fear him.
He’s attacking the freedom of the press...
He’s enlisting intelligence contractors to harvest our data and profile us...
He’s still working to undermine elections.
Remember, this guy already tried once to overthrow the government.
The same day you sent me and Raphael Warnock to the Senate, his mob sacked the Capitol Building.
On January 5th you elected us. On January 6th they tried to seize power, and failed.
On January 7th we got to work.
* We capped the price of insulin for seniors.
* We expanded Social Security for teachers, police officers, and first responders.
* We saved more than a million pensions from insolvency.
* We delivered the biggest investment in HBCUs of all time.
* We confirmed Ketanji Brown Jackson to the Supreme Court of the United States.
* We upgraded infrastructure in every part of our State of Georgia.
* We unleashed a manufacturing renaissance here in Coastal Georgia and statewide.

None of that would have happened without you, Georgia.
Now that they’re in power, in the same bill that defunded hospitals to cut taxes for the rich, they made the budget for mass deportations larger than the FBI, ATF, DEA, and the Bureau of Prisons combined.
It’ll be the largest domestic police force in American history. The ones with masks.
They say it’s about crime, and drugs, and gangs, and human trafficking, and cartels.
And those are serious threats that need to be confronted.
The cartels should be crushed. The border should be secure. The human traffickers should be brought to justice, and their victims liberated. If someone in this country illegally commits a crime, they have to leave.
But they're snatching people with no records. Even folks with work permits. They’re tearing families apart. A lot of them have kids or spouses who are American citizens. Some of them are American citizens.
They sent 11-year-old and 4-year-old little girls, both American citizens, both in the middle of cancer treatment, to Mexico and Honduras because their parents were undocumented.
They sent a mother, who was still breastfeeding her one-year-old U.S. citizen baby, to Cuba, without her child, and the little baby wound up in the hospital after being ripped from her mother’s breast.
There was a man in California, a father of three sons,
all three sons _United States Marines_.
The guy had no criminal record – and they didn’t just take him, they punched him in the head over and over again as he lay on the ground... in broad daylight, on camera. Did you see that?
If that’s what they’re doing in public, what do you think is happening in these detention centers?
Now, when you’ve got a government like this, it always comes with personal corruption.
And the Trumps are using the office of the Presidency to enrich themselves in a way we have never, ever seen in American history.
You guys are following Trump’s crypto thing, right? The meme coin?
There’s a guy named Justin Sun. He’s a Chinese oligarch. Billionaire.
A couple of years ago, the SEC starts investigating this guy for securities fraud.
Maybe he’s guilty, maybe he’s not. I don’t know. That’s not the point.
Because last year, Mr. Justin Sun, the Chinese billionaire under investigation by the U.S. government, starts investing tens of millions of dollars in Donald Trump’s crypto business.
To the point where he says he’s become the number-one holder in the world of the Trump coin.
Are you surprised to hear his federal case has gone away?
And then a few weeks ago he’s having dinner with the President. Because if you give the President cash, you get to have dinner with him. That’s a thing we’re doing in America now.
The President’s personal wealth is skyrocketing.
And the whole royal family is cashing in.
Jared Kushner’s firm got $2 billion from the Saudi royal family. Don Jr. and Eric are closing real estate deals all over the world.
Hunter Biden should have been more ambitious!
Remember how that was their number-one thing?
Now Trump’s getting money from foreign businessmen under federal investigation, and his boys are all over the world closing deals right before he touches down on state visits.
Eric said the other day, “We’re the hottest brand in the world right now.”
It’s amazing the opportunities that open up when your daddy is President and the whole world thinks he takes bribes.
But the truth is, corruption in America runs a lot deeper than Donald Trump.
See, I get why people voted for Trump.
Because even before he came on the scene, America had the most corrupt political system in the Western world.
It’s all been running on corporate money, secret money, billionaire money. Both sides!
And it’s worse than ever now.
Citizens United was the worst court decision in modern American history.
When members of Congress aren’t begging for money from lobbyists, they’re trying to dodge getting carpet-bombed by these super PACs. Senators get threatened every day with millions and millions of dollars of attack ads over the votes we take.
And see, this is why nothing works for ordinary people.
It's not because of woke college students...
or trans kids...
or because there are interracial couples in cereal commercials.
It’s because the people’s elected representatives don’t represent the people, they represent the donors.
And that corruption is why they just defunded nursing homes to cut taxes for the rich.
Corruption is why you pay a fortune for prescriptions.
Corruption is why your insurance claim keeps getting denied.
Corruption is why hedge funds get to buy up all the houses in your neighborhood, driving you out of the market, and then your corporate landlord ignores your calls during a gas leak.
Corruption is why that ambulance costs $3,000 after you just had to gett your choking toddler to the hospital.
Trump promised to attack a broken system. I get it. Ripe target.
But here’s the thing. He’s a crook and a con man and he wants to be a king.
Yes, the system really is rigged. But Trump’s not unrigging it. He’s re-rigging it for himself!
Savannah, trust me when I tell you — if we live up to our obligations as citizens, we will overcome this.
And once again, the country is counting on Georgia to lead the way.
Five years ago, when Raphael and I were running, they said there was no way.
They wanted us to give in to doubt and fear and despair.
But out of no way, we made a way.
And the State of Georgia, the heart of the old Confederacy and the Cradle of the Civil Rights Movement, sent a black pastor who holds Dr. King’s pulpit at Ebeneezer Baptist Church and the young Jewish son of an immigrant to the United States Senate.
When they told us there was no way, we knew better.
We knew we were on the right side of history.
We knew we could win. We could feel it.
And I’m telling you, Savannah, I can feel it again.
Can you feel it, Savannah?
That’s what you feel when your cause is just.
That’s how it feels when you push on the arc of history, and it starts bending toward justice.
In my Senate office, just over my desk, there’s a portrait of Congressman Lewis.
If the Congressman were here he might remind us what happened in Savannah, in 1960, when sit-ins at segregated lunch counters led to boycotts that led to voter registration drives that led to a new city government.
He might remind us that, within a year, that new city government desegregated those lunch counters; and by 1963, the businesses and public spaces; so that by 1964, Dr. King told the world Savannah was the most desegregated city in the south.
Savannah, you’ve led the way before. Are you ready to lead again?
The fight against Jim Crow was a struggle for universal civil and human rights.
Even after the great victories of that movement, that is still our struggle. Congressman Lewis always reminded us of that, too.
Today, our fight is against deeply entrenched corruption and greed.
Corruption and greed that have so deeply rotted our system that it gave rise to this depraved man who has now plagued our public life for nearly a decade.
But five years ago, here in Georgia, we lit a beacon of hope and possibility for the whole nation – and the whole world. It’s still shining.
And come next November, we will raise it higher.
Come next November, we will do our part to end this spiral into chaos and corruption.
And then there will again be so much work to do. Our possibilities are limitless.
Even once we have ended this President’s reign, we have to learn its lessons.
It’s the grip of money on our politics that led us to this moment of crisis. And so even when this fight is won, and we will win it, the fight against corruption – not of one man, but of our system, will define whether America becomes what America can be... for all its people.
We know here in Georgia that the measure of our success is not how many of the poorest and most vulnerable families we hunt down and shackle and imprison and deport; the measure of our success is whether each generation achieves greater freedom and health and prosperity than the last; and whether we live up to the promise of equal justice for all.
Savannah, are you ready to fight?
Savannah, are you ready to win?
Georgia will bow to no king.
Thank you all! Thank you, Savannah! Thank you!
* * *

_👋 Wait! Before you go... 👋_

Even once we have ended this President’s reign, we have to learn its lessons. It’s the grip of money on our politics that led us to this moment of crisis. And so even when this fight is won, and we will win it, the fight against corruption – not of one man, but of our system, will define whether America becomes what America can be... for all its people. We know here in Georgia that the measure of our success is not how many of the poorest and most vulnerable families we hunt down and shackle and imprison and deport; the measure of our success is whether each generation achieves greater freedom and health and prosperity than the last; and whether we live up to the promise of equal justice for all. Savannah, are you ready to fight? Savannah, are you ready to win? Georgia will bow to no king. Thank you all! Thank you, Savannah! Thank you! 👋 Wait! Before you go... 👋 Jon Ossoff in Georgia is the ONLY Democratic Senator running for re-election in a state Trump won. He is MAGA’s #1 target in the 2026 midterms. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | ** Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate

Hi friends! Wanted to run a few things by you.
A couple years ago, my team and I decided to overhaul this email program. We wanted to avoid the trap of stale, inauthentic fundraising messages and instead make sure you were getting real updates from me on the work we’re doing. I think it’s gone pretty well! I’m really proud of the community we’ve built here.
On that note, I’d love your input on my campaign social media channels.
My official accounts (the ones with “Rep” in the name!) focus on statements from my office, my take on legislation, and important info for constituents.
But I also have personal accounts where I post more about the campaign trail, life in San Diego, and political opinions. Two quick asks:

* Will you reply to this email and let me know what you'd want to see on those personal/campaign accounts?
I really value your feedback, and I want to make sure I’m sharing things people actually care about.
Thanks a lot,
Sara

name: Mikie Sherrill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Today, I need your help to stop MAGA Republicans from flipping New Jersey red.
Peter, it’s been a few weeks since I won the Democratic nomination for governor of New Jersey. But this race is already a rollercoaster — we’ve seen an outpouring of grassroots support and also faced a barrage of right-wing attacks.
Today, I need your help to stop MAGA Republicans from flipping New Jersey red, and I’m humbly asking you to **[split $5 between my team and Heartland Patriots to power our campaign to victory.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91507?refcode=em20250713-9109&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9109%2E614464%2ENrVMtj)** But if you’re not sure (which I understand!), here are five reasons I hope will convince you:
**1) New Jersey is not a safe Democratic state anymore — far from it.** The last governor’s election here? It was decided by 3%. New Jersey’s margin in the 2024 presidential election? 6%. The first polling in this race of the general election? It shows me leading my GOP opponent by only 3%.
**2) Donald Trump is going to do everything he can to defeat me in this race.** He’s already endorsed my opponent, Jack Ciattarelli, and led a rally for him — meaning MAGA money from all over the country is going to pour into Ciattarelli’s campaign.
**3) Unlike my opponent, I won’t ever hesitate to stand up to Trump when he attacks New Jersey families.** I’ve sworn an oath to the Constitution, and I’ve spent my career honoring it to the best of my ability every single day — before loyalty to any other politician or political party. Ciattarelli has already made clear that his number-one priority is staying in Trump’s good graces.
**4) My top priority as governor will be making life more affordable for New Jersey families.** I’ve put forward detailed plans for lowering the cost of everything from housing and energy to health care, child care, and groceries — and I’m going to hit the ground running on Day 1 making them a reality.
**5) The stakes of this race are high not only for New Jersey, but for the country.** This is our chance to show the entire nation that the people reject the Trump administration’s incompetence and authoritarianism. And it’s our chance to get started on a better path forward — one where we prioritize doing what’s best for working families over what’s best for billionaires and corrupt political allies. There is no more important bellwether ahead of 2026.
**[If any of these reasons speaks to you, I hope you will split a $5 donation between my team and Heartland Patriots to help me defeat my Trump-endorsed opponent in this incredibly competitive election to determine who leads our state for the next four years.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91507?refcode=em20250713-9109&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9109%2E614464%2ENrVMtj)**
**[DONATE →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91507?refcode=em20250713-9109&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9109%2E614464%2ENrVMtj)**
Thanks for reading, and have a great rest of your day.
-Mikie

| [](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
---|---|---
Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails_heartland-patriots/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_heartland_patriots/?t=4&akid=9109%2E614464%2ENrVMtj). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

Extreme Republicans are well-funded by billionaire backers and they’re focusing their money in vulnerable state legislatures – the RSLC just announced a $2 million investment in the states ahead of elections in Virginia and New Jersey. They’re determined to push their MAGA agenda into states nationwide.
But when supporters like you chip in $7, $25, or even $250 contributions to support our Democratic candidates, they add up and give Democrats the resources needed to win tough races nationwide.

name: Leaders We Deserve
subject: 74 votes changed history
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
You made this possible, Peter.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250713-1&t=1&akid=2377%2E587540%2EBbGto8)
Peter,
**In Texas, 74 votes changed history.**
That’s how close the race was when Molly Cook won her primary last year.
Seventy-four votes made her the youngest state senator in Texas — and helped defeat a Democrat who wanted to arm teachers in the classroom.
Since then, Molly has been _relentless._ She’s passed 7 bills into law, brought home over $100 million in critical investments, and showed up 100% for every vote. She’s not just the youngest in the chamber — she’s one of the hardest working.
She also went viral on social media this week when she clapped back against Republicans’ lies about Trump’s “One Big Beautiful Bill.”
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250713_1_mollycook?refcode=em20250713-2377&amount=5&refcode2=2377_587540_BbGto8&akid=2377%2E587540%2EBbGto8)
Molly is the epitome of a Leaders We Deserve candidate. And this is exactly the kind of leadership we need more of. Young. Progressive. Unapologetically bold.
And it only happened because grassroots supporters like you made it possible.
We’re proud to stand with Molly Cook. But we’re also fighting to elect more young leaders like her across the country. We’re flipping red seats blue, filling open ones, and challenging ineffective Democrats in safe blue seats. _It’s all on the table._
But we can’t elect the next generation of leaders without your support.
**[Can you split a $5 donation between Molly Cook and Leaders We Deserve so we can keep electing the next generation of leaders?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250713_1_mollycook?refcode=em20250713-2377&amount=5&refcode2=2377_587540_BbGto8&akid=2377%2E587540%2EBbGto8)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250713_1_mollycook?amount=5&refcode=em20250713-2377&refcode2=2377_587540_BbGto8&akid=2377%2E587540%2EBbGto8)**
Don’t ever think your vote doesn’t matter.
Because 74 votes really can change everything.
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250713-1&t=2&refcode2=2377_587540_BbGto8&akid=2377%2E587540%2EBbGto8)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=2377%2E587540%2EBbGto8)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2377%2E587540%2EBbGto8)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

name: PA Dems
subject: 100,000 jobs. One Supreme Court. Everything is on the line.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
| |
---
Peter,

The Supreme Court handed Trump a loaded weapon. He asked for the power to gut the federal workforce, and they said yes.

That means over 100,000 Pennsylvanians are staring down layoffs. Not hypotheticals. Not warnings. Actual people. Real jobs. Gone.

Entire communities in this state rely on those paychecks. Veterans Affairs. Social Security offices. Housing support. Environmental protection. Food assistance. **And now all of it is on the line because one man and his freak show of enablers want to burn it all down for sport.**

They call it “efficiency.” That’s bullsh*t.

It’s sabotage. It’s a political hit on working families. It’s cruelty made policy.

And when the layoffs start rolling in, they won’t stop with the workers. They’ll come for the people who depend on those services. Veterans who need medical care. Seniors waiting for their Social Security. Kids in low-income households who don’t know where the next meal is coming from. That’s what this ruling makes possible.

Meanwhile, Pennsylvania’s got three Supreme Court seats on the ballot this fall. If we lose them, Republicans will have the power to greenlight even more of this garbage — and block every attempt we make to fix it.

We have one job now. Fight like hell to stop them. [And the first step to that fight is for you to donate $10 now, if you can!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111427971/557192660/-1020196347?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250713_FR_scotus_0_3MO_PADems_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDZkZjhiNy0zNjYwLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KOrUmzxp-BswAhL2IEV7tF3ICFFdoY35ExuJEoyXXa4=) | | [CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111427974/557192663/-1020196347?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250713_FR_scotus_0_3MO_PADems_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDZkZjhiNy0zNjYwLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KOrUmzxp-BswAhL2IEV7tF3ICFFdoY35ExuJEoyXXa4=)

There’s no more room for waiting or hoping someone else steps in. If we don’t show up, they win. It’s that simple.

— PA Dems

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: The worst symptom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Blaming Trump for all of our problems is not going to put the fire out.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2592%2E4032634%2ErQv6Wq)
---
It’s important to remember that Trump is not the cause of everything that’s broken in America. Don’t get me wrong, he has certainly poured gasoline on the fire. But blaming Trump for all of our problems is not going to put the fire out. There are systemic issues that led to someone like him getting elected in the first place. He is the worst symptom of a corrupt system that rewards the rich and powerful at the expense of everyone else. This system has plagued us for years. It’s a system where Reagan’s trickle-down experiment failed — and is still failing — America’s middle class. A system that has made it harder and harder to start and join a union. A system that says that companies donating exorbitant amounts of money to a political campaign is a form of “free speech.” A system where the government bailed out banks rather than homeowners after the 2008 financial crisis. A system that allows a family to go bankrupt because they dared to receive medical care. A system that allows minority rule in our government because of a racist and archaic filibuster rule. Look, we must call out and tend to the root causes of the deep problems in our economy, our government, and our democracy — the problems that existed way before Donald Trump rode down that elevator in 2015. That’s what I’m focused on while we also fight back against the harms the Trump administration brings us over the next four years. The Democratic party must, must, must fight back with defiant action instead of just pushing back with great reluctance — while also connecting the dots between today’s crises, yesterday’s systemic causes, and the solutions we’re championing. It’s going to take a lot of work to untangle this system — with political leaders fighting for the bold solutions and a strong grassroots movement calling for a better way forward. That’s why it’s so important for you to stay in this fight. **If Democrats can show the American people what it means for a government to actually work for working people — and draw contrasts between that and what the Trump Administration is actually doing — then we can lay a strong foundation for a new way forward in the midterms and beyond.** [**If you’re on board with this roadmap, then please pitch in $28 or anything you can to support our work ahead. I’m going to do everything I can in the Senate to fight back against the Trump administration and advocate for the Democratic party to focus on the bold solutions necessary to fixing our systemic challenges. Your support is what makes this possible.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3058?amount=28&t=8&akid=2592%2E4032634%2ErQv6Wq)

---

name: GOTV PAC
subject: $200 billion for Trump’s secret police
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email06302025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email06302025&amount=25]
Peter ,
Trump's "One Big Beautiful Bill" is more than just cruel.
Yes, it slashes health care. Yes, it raises taxes on families making less than $15,000 a year so billionaires can get another handout. But buried inside this legislative monstrosity is something even more dangerous:
A $200 billion blank check to supercharge ICE and CBP into the most heavily funded and least accountable federal law enforcement agencies in U.S. history.
🚨 ICE is getting more funding than the FBI, DEA, ATF, U.S. Marshals, and Bureau of Prisons combined.
🚨 They're hiring 20,000+ new agents with no plan for oversight, no time for training, and a pipeline of extremists who want to brutalize our neighbors.
🚨 And they're doing it while the White House makes memes mocking migrants, taunting critics, and turning ICE raids into social media "wins."
We need to hit back hard, and that starts by organizing voters to take Congress away from the MAGA extremists. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email07132025&amount=25]

Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]

name: Democrats.org
subject: Why this FEC deadline matters:
body:
---
Derek, **We’re nearly halfway through the month, which means we are nearly halfway to our next FEC deadline. After the deadline passes, we’ll be required to report how much we’ve raised.** This is the first report we’ll file after Trump and congressional Republicans passed their disastrous budget bill — ripping health care coverage from 17 million Americans, putting rural hospitals at risk, and overwhelming food banks. Republicans have seen the polling. They know their bill is unpopular. And if we report a large number of donations at the end of this month, they’ll see that there is serious grassroots opposition to their agenda. They’ll see that we are building the support we need to take back Congress and elect Democrats who will act as a check on Trump’s power. **If you could pitch in today — $3 or any amount that’s meaningful to you — you’d be joining thousands of grassroots supporters in showing Republicans that they made a mistake when they and Trump put the interests of billionaires above the needs of the rest of us.** [**Help us send that message today by making a contribution now:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250713_3943_fr&refcode2=3943_22930333_wfxGjF&akid=3943%2E22930333%2EwfxGjF) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250713_3943_fr&refcode2=3943_22930333_wfxGjF&akid=3943%2E22930333%2EwfxGjF)**
